name: REAC Group, Inc.
summary: REAC Group, Inc., through its subsidiaries, provides transportation, logistics, and warehouse distribution services for perishable and other cargo. It offers refrigerated long haul, regional, and dedicated deliveries for industries that include floral, produce, plants, dairy, poultry, and meats, as well as offers dry cargo, office space, trucking, and ocean freight services. The company is based in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.
